name: runar
description: TypeScript-to-Bitcoin Script compiler for BSV smart contracts

scripts.conformance:ts: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests
scripts.conformance:rust: cd compilers/rust && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" cargo test --test compiler_tests
scripts.conformance:multi: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests --multi-format
scripts.conformance:all: pnpm run conformance:ts && pnpm run conformance:go && pnpm run conformance:rust && pnpm run conformance:python && pnpm run conformance:zig && pnpm run conformance:ruby && pnpm run conformance:sdk
scripts.examples:ts: npx vitest run examples/ts examples/sol examples/move
scripts.examples:all: pnpm run examples:ts && pnpm run examples:go && pnpm run examples:rust && pnpm run examples:python
scripts.integration:teranode: cd integration/go && NODE_TYPE=teranode go test -tags integration -v -timeout 600s
scripts.integration:teranode:run: cd integration && ./teranode.sh clean && ./teranode.sh start && cd go && NODE_TYPE=teranode go test -tags integration -v -timeout 600s; cd .. && ./teranode.sh stop
scripts.integration:python: cd integration/python && ([ -d .venv ] || (python3.13 -m venv .venv 2>/dev/null || python3 -m venv .venv) && .venv/bin/pip install -q -r requirements.txt) && PYTHONPATH=../../compilers/python:../../packages/runar-py .venv/bin/pytest -v
scripts.whitepaper: cd docs && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex
